doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)

reason: The document contains multiple highly specific elements (protocol naming “EAJP-2025,” detailed eligibility rules, EAJP-Form 1A, and B&P Code §6125) that are not verifiable as authentic State Bar/LS TFC materials and appear invented.
